---
name: caveman-compress
description: >
  Compress prose-heavy memory files, notes, preferences, TODOs, or CLAUDE-style context files
  into caveman format to cut token cost without losing technical substance. Use when: token
  bloat; memory file too long; context budget pressure; compress notes before reuse; shrink
  session memory; preserve code blocks, inline code, headings, and URLs; overwrite original
  after validation. Trigger: /caveman:compress <filepath> or "compress memory file".
---

@ref[.resources/skills/caveman-compress.md]
